% !TEX TS-program = tectonic
%
% Generated from src/content/cv.json by scripts/render_cv.py.
% Do not edit by hand — edit the JSON and re-run `npm run cv:build`.
%
% Style: neo-brutalist (mono headers, thick black rules, no chrome).
% Mirrors the visual language of rusen.ai/cv.

\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}

% XeTeX-native font setup (tectonic uses XeTeX). TeX Gyre Heros is the
% Helvetica clone with full Latin Extended coverage including Turkish
% (Ş, İ, Ğ, ı). Latin Modern Mono Light for the mono headers — same
% Turkish coverage and a more elegant weight than default Inconsolata.
\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{TeX Gyre Heros}
\setmonofont{Latin Modern Mono Light}[Scale=MatchLowercase]
\renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}


% fontawesome5 segfaults tectonic when combined with the volume of content
% in this CV (reliably reproducible). fontawesome (v4) is rock-solid here
% and covers every glyph we need.
\usepackage{fontawesome}
\usepackage[top=0.6in, bottom=0.55in, left=0.7in, right=0.7in]{geometry}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{needspace}

\setstretch{1.15}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}
\raggedright

\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=false,
  pdfborder={0 0 0},
  pdftitle={RUSEN BIRBEN CV},
  pdfauthor={RUSEN BIRBEN}
}
\pagestyle{empty}

% Section colors
\definecolor{cvsecnum}{HTML}{C0C0C0}
\definecolor{cvrule}{HTML}{111111}

% Custom section command: "01 EXPERIENCE" with a muted number prefix and a
% thick rule under, mirroring the HTML CV's section style. Title content
% is expected to already be uppercased (locale-aware) by the Jinja
% `upper` filter — we don't call \MakeUppercase here because it doesn't
% know about Turkish dotted-i.
\newcounter{cvsec}
\setcounter{cvsec}{0}
\newcommand{\cvsection}[1]{%
  \refstepcounter{cvsec}%
  \needspace{4\baselineskip}%
  \par\vspace{14pt}%
  \noindent%
  {\ttfamily\bfseries\large%
    \textcolor{cvsecnum}{\ifnum\value{cvsec}<10 0\fi\thecvsec}%
    \hspace{0.65em}%
    #1%
  }%
  \par\vspace{2pt}%
  {\color{cvrule}\noindent\rule{\linewidth}{1.6pt}}%
  \par\vspace{8pt}%
}

\newcommand{\barsep}{\hspace{6pt}\textbar\hspace{6pt}}
\newcommand{\rowdates}[1]{\hfill{\ttfamily\small #1}}
% Small superscript outgoing-arrow icon for hyperlinked items.
\newcommand{\extarrow}{\,{\footnotesize\faExternalLink}}

\begin{document}

% ======================================================================
% SUMMARY
% ======================================================================
\cvsection{SUMMARY}
AI \& Data Engineering graduate from Istanbul Technical University, currently a graduate researcher at METU's Applied NLP Group working on LLMs and Turkish language technologies. Experience across NLP, LLMs, and agentic AI applications; previously co-founded Fiction Studios at Bilkent Cyberpark, an AI startup that built LLM-powered guides for museums and tourists.

% ======================================================================
% EXPERIENCE
% ======================================================================
\cvsection{EXPERIENCE}

\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Graduate Researcher}\rowdates{04/2026 - Present}\\
{\itshape\href{https://nlp.ceng.metu.edu.tr}{METU Applied NLP Group\extarrow}}\rowdates{Ankara, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Lead \href{https://www.youtube.com/@metunlpconnect}{METU NLP Connect}, the lab's YouTube channel: expert interviews, educational explainers on LLMs and modern NLP, and recent-paper spotlights. Member of the Applied NLP Group (led by Asst. Prof. Çağrı Toraman), working on LLMs, generative AI, and Turkish language technologies.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Co-Founder}\rowdates{08/2025 - 04/2026}\\
{\itshape\href{https://fictionstudios.ai}{Fiction Studios\extarrow}}\rowdates{Ankara, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Co-founded an AI startup at Bilkent Cyberpark, an accredited Turkish Teknokent. Built an LLM-powered guide app for museums and tourists. Wound down in 2026.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Junior AI Engineer}\rowdates{03/2025 - 07/2025}\\
{\itshape\href{https://cyberquote.com/tk/}{CyberQuote\extarrow}}\rowdates{Istanbul, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Built AI automations and agentic LLM implementations for Phillip Capital subsidiary. Intelligent systems for operations and customer-facing platforms.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{NLP Research Intern}\rowdates{07/2024 - 08/2024}\\
{\itshape\href{https://nlp.itu.edu.tr/}{ITU NLP Lab\extarrow}}\rowdates{Istanbul, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Researched LLMs for financial applications: forecasting, sentiment analysis, tool usage, reasoning, and RAG implementations.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{AIOps Research Intern}\rowdates{08/2024 - 09/2024}\\
{\itshape\href{https://havelsan.com/tr}{Havelsan\extarrow}}\rowdates{Istanbul, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small AIOps research using software log data for predictive maintenance. Generated demos on HDFS logs.}\\[8pt]
